title: Taste and Product Polish
description: Improve UI, UX, copy, spacing, accessibility, and product feel with concrete evidence and product-specific fit.
body: Improve product UI, UX, copy, spacing, and interaction quality from concrete evidence. Inspect the existing design system, component patterns, accessibility requirements, and user-visible behavior. Use consistent spacing, typography, color, motion, states, and responsive layout. Verify dependencies before using third-party UI or motion libraries. Prefer concrete data, reliable assets, accessible contrast, stable layout, and product-specific copy. Final output names changed files, visual behavior, accessibility checks, and validation evidence.
